store_header.notes: n=44. cap_rel med 1.125 is the tilted-square THE HOME DEPOT wordmark + slogan, rendered from the logo overlay, not scaled body text. Non-logo header lines are body size.

address.notes: n=176. Store/address lines body-sized, normal weight (cap_rel med 1.025, stroke_rel med 0.989).

transaction.notes: n=17. SALE/CASHIER/register lines body-sized, slightly light (cap_rel med 0.974, stroke_rel med 0.966).

item.notes: n=82. Item lines are the body baseline (cap_rel med 1.0, stroke_rel med 1.03).

discount.notes: n=127. Pro Xtra / MAX REFUND lines body-sized, normal weight (cap_rel med 1.0, stroke_rel med 1.0).

summary.notes: n=24. SUBTOTAL/SALES TAX print slightly smaller (cap_rel med 0.925), normal stroke.

total_line.notes: n=21. TOTAL/USD block prints slightly smaller than body (cap_rel med 0.937), normal weight.

payment.notes: n=49. Card/auth block body-sized, a touch light (cap_rel med 1.0, stroke_rel med 0.98).

footer.notes: n=46. Pro Xtra footer / credit copy body-sized, normal weight (cap_rel med 0.977, stroke_rel med 0.96).
